_comment: Curated Grafana dashboards downloaded from grafana.com on every `terragrunt apply` of the grafana module. Researched 2026-05-03 — the IDs below are the most maintained / most-downloaded option for each service in the COELHO Cloud as of that date.
_browse: Find dashboards at https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/ — copy the numeric ID into the `id` field.
_workflow: Add/remove entries here, then `cd live/homelab/30-observability/grafana && terragrunt apply`. data.http re-fetches each dashboard's latest revision; if grafana.com updated it, the ConfigMap diffs and Grafana's sidecar re-imports.
_skipped_charts_already_ship_dashboards: Mimir's chart ships 26 dashboards via metaMonitoring.dashboards.enabled (already on). Loki's chart ships dashboards via monitoring.dashboards.enabled (already on). No JSON entries needed for those — they auto-load via labeled ConfigMaps.
_skipped_no_metrics: Vaultwarden, Open WebUI, pgAdmin, RedisInsight, Homepage — these services either don't expose /metrics or have no published dashboard. Nothing to do.

dashboards.name: postgresql
dashboards.description: PostgreSQL Monitoring Dashboard — comprehensive (instance info, alerts, connection analysis, query performance, cache & I/O, locks & blocking, vacuum, WAL, replication, table stats). Newer alternative to id 9628.

dashboards.name: redis
dashboards.description: Redis Exporter Quickstart — by oliver006, author of the canonical redis_exporter. Works with bitnami/redis exporter sidecar.

dashboards.name: minio-cluster
dashboards.description: MinIO Cluster Dashboard — official Grafana Labs dashboard, uses /minio/v2/metrics/cluster.

dashboards.name: minio-bucket
dashboards.description: MinIO Bucket Dashboard — per-bucket metrics. Useful since we have multiple buckets (mimir-blocks, loki-chunks, tempo-traces, backups, etc.).

dashboards.name: tailscale-overview
dashboards.description: Tailscale / Overview — official, by Tailscale. Tailnet API metrics: devices, users, auth keys.

dashboards.name: tailscale-machine
dashboards.description: Tailscale / Machine — official, by Tailscale. Per-machine daemon metrics: traffic by path, dropped packets, DERP vs non-DERP.

dashboards.name: grafana-internals
dashboards.description: Grafana Internal Metrics — newer/more comprehensive than the legacy id 3590. Covers API request rates, datasource latencies, plugin stats.

dashboards.name: tempo-opentelemetry
dashboards.description: OpenTelemetry & Tempo — Tempo operations + OTel collector overview. The single-binary Tempo chart doesn't ship dashboards (only tempo-distributed does via metaMonitoring), so we pull this one explicitly.

dashboards.name: alloy-microservices
dashboards.description: K8S Dashboard for Alloy Metrics — Microservices Overview. Drills from cluster-level Alloy stats down to per-pod component flow. The Alloy chart doesn't ship dashboards by default.

dashboards.name: gitlab-overview
dashboards.description: GitLab Self-managed — Overview. Top-level health: Rails request rates, Sidekiq queues, Gitaly latency, DB pool, web sessions.

dashboards.name: gitlab-gitaly
dashboards.description: GitLab Self-managed — Gitaly. Git repository server: command latency, RPC volume, SSH/HTTP traffic split.

dashboards.name: gitlab-workhorse
dashboards.description: GitLab Self-managed — Workhorse. Reverse proxy + git protocol: request rates, response codes, large-blob streaming.

dashboards.name: gitlab-ci-pipelines
dashboards.description: GitLab Self-managed — CI Pipelines. Job throughput, queue wait time, runner availability, pipeline durations.

dashboards.name: gitlab-runner
dashboards.description: GitLab Runner — concurrent jobs, request rates, errored jobs, runner version distribution.

dashboards.name: argocd-operational
dashboards.description: ArgoCD Operational — kubectl op rates, redis ops, sync stats, repo-server / controller / appset metrics.

dashboards.name: argocd-applications
dashboards.description: ArgoCD Applications — per-Application sync status, health, drift, deploy duration. Populates once you create Applications.

dashboards.name: qdrant
dashboards.description: Qdrant vector database metrics — collection sizes, request latencies, search/upsert throughput, index status.

dashboards.name: elasticsearch
dashboards.description: Elasticsearch — by sherzberg. Cluster health, JVM heap, indexing/search rates, doc counts, segment counts, queue stats.

dashboards.name: mlflow
dashboards.description: MLflow tracking server — Prometheus metrics, request latency, experiment run counters, system resources.

_future_dashboards_uncomment_when_module.name: gitlab-omnibus
_future_dashboards_uncomment_when_module.description: GitLab Omnibus — overview for self-hosted GitLab CE/EE

_future_dashboards_uncomment_when_module.name: node-exporter
_future_dashboards_uncomment_when_module.description: Node Exporter Full — by rfraile, the canonical node metrics dashboard. Add when node-exporter ships.

_future_dashboards_uncomment_when_module.name: k8s-views-global
_future_dashboards_uncomment_when_module.description: K8S Dashboard / Views / Global — by dotdc. Requires kube-state-metrics.
